x-enumeration-literals.name: Asset Custody Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Safely holds assets such as securities (stocks, bonds), cash instruments, or physical valuables.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Ownership Protection Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures that the customer retains legal ownership of the assets while the bank acts as custodian.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Record Keeping Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maintains accurate records of asset holdings, movements, and ownership details.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Support Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Facilitates transfer, delivery, or settlement of assets when transactions occur (e.g., buying/selling securities).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Corporate Actions Management Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handles events such as dividends, interest payments, stock splits, or maturities on behalf of the customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Security & Risk Control Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Protects assets against loss, theft, or unauthorized access through strong controls and monitoring.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting & Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides statements and reports for customers, auditors, and regulators.
